_meta.source: IS 269:2015 Ordinary Portland Cement - Specification (Sixth Revision), Amd 1:2023. Pages supplied as scrambled-font PDF; the TABLES rendered cleanly and are transcribed verbatim. Plus a cement-family registry for D6/D2.
_meta.feeds_check: D6 (cement spec) and D2 (editions / withdrawn codes).
_meta.extraction_note: IS 269 prose was BIS-scrambled, but Table 1 (performance improvers), Table 2 (chemical), and Table 3 (physical) came through readable and are transcribed without verify flags. IS 1489 Part 1 entries are from web search (no clean upload yet) and are flagged verify_against_pdf:true.
_meta.key_finding_withdrawn_codes: IS 269:2015 absorbed and SUPERSEDED IS 8112:2013 (OPC 43) and IS 12269:2013 (OPC 53), both now WITHDRAWN. A DBR citing IS 8112 or IS 12269 for 43/53-grade OPC is citing a dead code -> D6/D2 FLAW, redirect to IS 269:2015.

clauses.title: Classification of OPC
clauses.statement: Ordinary Portland Cement is classified and designated as: OPC 33, OPC 43, OPC 43-S (sleeper grade), OPC 53, OPC 53-S (sleeper grade). The numeral is the minimum 28-day compressive strength in MPa. (Grades 43 and 53 were previously in IS 8112 and IS 12269, now withdrawn and merged here.)

clauses.title: Manufacture / Performance Improvers
clauses.statement: Performance improvers may be added at the grinding stage; per Cl 5.1.1 each is limited per Table 1 and the total addition (inclusive of up to 1.0 percent grinding additives) shall not exceed 5 percent.

clauses.title: Chemical Requirements
clauses.statement: When tested per IS 4032, OPC shall comply with the chemical requirements of Table 2.

clauses.title: Physical Requirements
clauses.statement: OPC shall comply with the physical requirements of Table 3 (fineness, soundness, setting time, compressive strength), tested per the IS 4031 parts indicated.

clauses.title: Performance Improvers (max % addition by mass)
clauses.note: Each improver max 5 percent; total addition (incl. <=1% grinding additive) <= 5 percent.

rice_husk_ash.conform: reactive silica >= 80%, pozzolanic activity index >= 90%, LOI <= 5.0%

clauses.title: Portland Pozzolana Cement (fly-ash) - Chemical Requirements
clauses.statement: PPC fly-ash based (IS 1489 Part 1:2015, Amd 1:2018). Chemical requirements (Table 1, Clause 6): insoluble residue per fly-ash-content formula; magnesia <= 6%; total SO3 <= 3%; LOI <= 5%; chloride <= 0.1% (0.05% prestressed); alkali per Note. Physical requirements in Table 2 (Clause 7) - fineness/soundness/setting time/compressive strength behave to a 33-grade-equivalent minimum (28-day >= 33 MPa). Values from web search; confirm against a clean IS 1489 Part 1 upload.

clauses.title: Valid Cement Types and Withdrawn Codes
clauses.statement: Reference registry for D6 (valid cement types a DBR may specify) and D2 (currency / withdrawn codes).
